hypothesis: If end-to-end extraction of ChemX nanozyme and chelate complex articles is performed with domain-specific multi-agent systems or a novel single-agent pipeline, then per-column F1 scores across dataset features will be higher than those achieved by baseline models (GPT-5, GPT-5 Thinking, and ChatGPT Agent) due to improved structured-text extraction, strict output schemas, and multimodal processing.
